name: WIPO Convention 1967 (World Intellectual Property Organization)
summary: The Convention Establishing the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO Convention) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-WIPO-treaty framework adopted in Stockholm — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-intellectual-property framework + foundational IP framework alongside TRIPS framework (WIPO Convention signed 14 July 1967 in Stockholm Sweden + effective 26 April 1970 + United International Bureaux for the Protection of Intellectual Property BIRPI predecessor founded 1893 in Berne Switzerland + WIPO became UN specialized agency 17 December 1974 — formal foundational WIPO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WIPO organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-intellectual-property framework + foundational IP framework alongside TRIPS framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT 1970 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Madrid System for International Registration of Marks framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Hague System for International Registration of Industrial Designs framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Berne Convention 1886 framework via WIPO administration + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Paris Convention 1883 framework via WIPO administration + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Marrakesh Treaty 2013 visually-impaired-persons accessible-books framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal WIPO AI Treaty negotiations 2024-2026 framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT 1970 framework (Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT signed 19 June 1970 in Washington DC + effective 24 January 1978 providing formal international patent application framework — formal foundational Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-patent-application framework via single PCT-application-process framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Berne Convention 1886 + Paris Convention 1883 framework (Berne Convention for the Protection of Literary and Artistic Works signed 9 September 1886 in Berne Switzerland + Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property signed 20 March 1883 in Paris France — formal foundational Berne Convention + Paris Convention frameworks, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Berne Convention copyright framework + Paris Convention industrial-property framework via WIPO administration framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Marrakesh Treaty 2013 visually-impaired-persons framework (Marrakesh Treaty to Facilitate Access to Published Works for Persons Who Are Blind, Visually Impaired, or Otherwise Print Disabled signed 27 June 2013 in Marrakesh Morocco + effective 30 September 2016 providing formal accessible-books framework for visually-impaired-persons + 100 contracting parties as of 2026 framework — formal foundational Marrakesh Treaty visually-impaired-persons framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal visually-impaired-persons accessible-books framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal disability-rights IP framework). The WIPO Convention is binding upon 193 WIPO member states as of 2026 matching UN membership — substantial universal coverage framework. The Convention is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal WIPO Berne Convention framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal copyright-on-PA-literature-and-research framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework. The WIPO General Assembly + WIPO Conference + WIPO Coordination Committee + WIPO Director General + WIPO Secretariat + WIPO Arbitration and Mediation Center are the formal WIPO bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The WIPO Convention is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: WIPO Convention
statutory_framework.relevance: Convention Establishing the World Intellectual Property Organization signed 14 July 1967 in Stockholm Sweden + effective 26 April 1970 — formal foundational WIPO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WIPO organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: PCT
statutory_framework.relevance: Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT signed 19 June 1970 in Washington DC + effective 24 January 1978 — formal foundational PCT international-patent-application framework.

statutory_framework.title: Berne Convention
statutory_framework.relevance: Berne Convention for the Protection of Literary and Artistic Works signed 9 September 1886 in Berne Switzerland + effective 5 December 1887 — formal foundational Berne Convention copyright framework.

statutory_framework.title: Paris Convention
statutory_framework.relevance: Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property signed 20 March 1883 in Paris France + effective 7 July 1884 — formal foundational Paris Convention industrial-property framework.

statutory_framework.title: Marrakesh Treaty
statutory_framework.relevance: Marrakesh Treaty to Facilitate Access to Published Works for Persons Who Are Blind, Visually Impaired, or Otherwise Print Disabled signed 27 June 2013 in Marrakesh Morocco + effective 30 September 2016 — formal foundational Marrakesh Treaty visually-impaired-persons accessible-books framework.

apex_courts.name: WIPO General Assembly
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for WIPO.

apex_courts.name: WIPO Director General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for WIPO.

apex_courts.name: WIPO Arbitration and Mediation Center
apex_courts.role: Formal WIPO IP dispute-resolution framework body.

anonymisation_convention: WIPO-related communications operate via state-state framework + IP holder framework via WIPO Arbitration and Mediation Center; individual communications limited under WIPO framework.

key_developments.title: Paris Convention adopted
key_developments.description: Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property signed 20 March 1883 in Paris France — formal foundational Paris Convention industrial-property framework adopted.

key_developments.title: Berne Convention adopted
key_developments.description: Berne Convention for the Protection of Literary and Artistic Works signed 9 September 1886 in Berne Switzerland — formal foundational Berne Convention copyright framework adopted.

key_developments.title: BIRPI established
key_developments.description: United International Bureaux for the Protection of Intellectual Property BIRPI established 1893 in Berne Switzerland — predecessor framework to WIPO.

key_developments.title: WIPO Convention adopted
key_developments.description: WIPO Convention signed 14 July 1967 in Stockholm Sweden — formal foundational WIPO treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: WIPO Convention enters force + Patent Cooperation Treaty signed
key_developments.description: WIPO Convention entered force 26 April 1970 + Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT signed 19 June 1970 in Washington DC — formal foundational WIPO + PCT framework operational.

key_developments.title: WIPO becomes UN specialized agency
key_developments.description: WIPO became UN specialized agency 17 December 1974 — formal WIPO UN specialized agency framework operational.

key_developments.title: TRIPS Agreement + WIPO Copyright Treaty 1996
key_developments.description: TRIPS Agreement entered force 1 January 1995 + WIPO Copyright Treaty WCT + WIPO Performances and Phonograms Treaty WPPT signed 20 December 1996 in Geneva — formal foundational TRIPS + WIPO Internet Treaties framework operational.

key_developments.title: Marrakesh Treaty adopted
key_developments.description: Marrakesh Treaty to Facilitate Access to Published Works for Persons Who Are Blind, Visually Impaired, or Otherwise Print Disabled signed 27 June 2013 in Marrakesh Morocco — formal foundational Marrakesh Treaty visually-impaired-persons framework adopted.

key_developments.title: Marrakesh Treaty enters force
key_developments.description: Marrakesh Treaty entered force 30 September 2016 — formal foundational Marrakesh Treaty visually-impaired-persons framework operational.

key_developments.title: WIPO Treaty on IP Genetic Resources + Associated Traditional Knowledge adopted
key_developments.description: WIPO Treaty on Intellectual Property, Genetic Resources and Associated Traditional Knowledge signed 24 May 2024 in Geneva Switzerland — formal foundational WIPO Indigenous-Peoples-Traditional-Knowledge framework adopted.

key_developments.title: WIPO AI Treaty negotiations
key_developments.description: WIPO AI Treaty negotiations 2024-2026 framework — formal WIPO AI Treaty negotiation framework operational.

structural_findings: WIPO Convention operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places WIPO Convention in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-intellectual-property framework + foundational IP framework alongside TRIPS framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-intellectual-property framework + foundational IP framework alongside TRIPS framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT 1970 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Madrid System for International Registration of Marks framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Hague System for International Registration of Industrial Designs framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Berne Convention 1886 framework via WIPO administration + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Paris Convention 1883 framework via WIPO administration + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Marrakesh Treaty 2013 visually-impaired-persons accessible-books framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal WIPO AI Treaty negotiations 2024-2026 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Patent Cooperation Treaty PCT 1970 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-patent-application framework via single PCT-application-process framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Berne Convention 1886 + Paris Convention 1883 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Berne Convention copyright framework + Paris Convention industrial-property framework via WIPO administration framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Marrakesh Treaty 2013 visually-impaired-persons framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal visually-impaired-persons accessible-books framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal disability-rights IP framework.
193 WIPO member state ratification framework matching UN membership is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1883 Paris Convention + 1886 Berne Convention + 1893 BIRPI + 1967 WIPO Convention + 1970 entry into force + PCT + 1974 UN specialized agency + 1995 TRIPS + 1996 WCT + WPPT + 2013 Marrakesh + 2016 entry into force + 2024 IP Genetic Resources + 2025 AI Treaty negotiations WIPO-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

WIPO Convention + Paris + Berne + PCT + Madrid + Hague + Marrakesh + WCT + WPPT + IP Genetic Resources + Arbitration and Mediation Center formal undecet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal copyright-on-PA-literature-and-research framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other global supranational frameworks.
editorial_notes: WIPO Convention jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-intellectual-property foundational-WIPO-treaty meta-framework (WIPO Convention 1967/1970 + PCT 1970/1978 + Berne 1886/1887 + Paris 1883/1884 + Madrid System + Hague System + Marrakesh 2013/2016 + WCT + WPPT 1996 + IP Genetic Resources 2024 + AI Treaty negotiations 2024-2026 + BIRPI 1893 predecessor + UN specialized agency 1974). Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-intellectual-property framework + foundational IP framework alongside TRIPS + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal PCT + Madrid System + Hague System + Berne + Paris + Marrakesh + AI Treaty negotiations + central jurisdiction of formal PCT single-application-process + central jurisdiction of formal Berne + Paris via WIPO administration + central jurisdiction of formal Marrakesh visually-impaired-persons accessible-books + 193 WIPO member states matching UN membership + WIPO Headquartered Geneva + 1883 Paris + 1886 Berne + 1893 BIRPI + 1967 WIPO Convention + 1970 entry into force + PCT + 1974 UN specialized agency + 1995 TRIPS + 1996 WCT + WPPT + 2013 Marrakesh + 2016 entry into force + 2024 IP Genetic Resources + 2025 AI Treaty negotiations WIPO-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: WIPO Berne Convention framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal copyright-on-PA-literature-and-research framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other global supranational frameworks.
